name: 9853-stable-mcp-fresh-conversation
_purpose: Stable-channel repro for warpdotdev/warp#9853. Tests whether a globally-configured file-based MCP server (~/.warp/.mcp.json) is visible to the Warp agent in a brand-new conversation, before any terminal command has been run. If the bug reproduces, the agent will fail to find the proof-mcp whoami tool. If it does not reproduce (per vkodithala's 2026-05-22 review), the agent will call the tool and the unique identifier 'proof-mcp:warp#9853:david-engelmann' will render on screen.
_safety: Cmd+T opens a fresh tab so the foreground window has a terminal prompt + agent input (not a markdown viewer). The first OCR anchor confirms 'Warp anything' is visible BEFORE any typing. `abort_if_text` patterns target shell-history dropdown content (the empirical leak surface). `click_text` hard-fails if OCR can't find the target — never blind-clicks.

steps.text: use the whoami tool from proof-mcp
